message:
feat(freeze): make _tsc work end-to-end and add dispatch caching (2.16x speedup)

Two major changes:

1. Fix native Math codegen bug: shouldSkipForNativeMath would skip
   get_var("Math") + get_field2("abs") but then force_stack_mode prevented
   tryEmitNativeMathCall from emitting the native replacement at call_method.
   Added native_math_skipped flag to bridge the gap.

2. Add frozen function dispatch caching: cache frozen function pointers
   directly in JSFunctionBytecode.frozen_impl to avoid hash map lookups
   on every call. NULL=not looked up, (void*)1=miss cached, other=fn ptr.
   Reduces _tsc runtime from 12.25s to 5.68s (2.16x faster).
